title: Commodities Wrap
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity prices saw some mean reversion, with oil prices retreating from a recent high while metals pared some of their recent losses. Crude oil prices retreated after touching a high of USD97/bbl on Wednesday. US oil inventories fell to a multi-year seasonal low; this supported the steepening backwardated curve for both Brent and WTI.
